name: Greenfield Project Team
description: Launch new projects from requirements through architecture to initial implementation

responsibilities: Transform business goals into user stories and acceptance criteria
Design system architecture and technology selection
Define component boundaries and integration patterns
Create ADRs for key technical decisions
Design API contracts and data models
Define service boundaries and communication patterns
Establish API versioning and evolution strategy
Set up project scaffolding and CI/CD pipeline

use_cases: Proof of concept for technical feasibility

handoffs.gate: Requirements validated with stakeholders; NFRs quantified
Environment requirements defined; scaling strategy documented
OpenAPI spec validates; mock server passes smoke tests

overlap_resolution.technology_selection: architecture-designer makes final call; api-designer advises on API framework
overlap_resolution.data_modeling: api-designer owns API-level models; architecture-designer owns persistence strategy
